MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-31-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUDGE MARLA J. MILLER DISCLOSED THAT HIS FATHER HAS A FINANCIAL INTEREST WITH WELLS FARGO BANK OF WHICH SHE IS ACTING AS A FIDUCIARY AND THEREFORE SHE IS DISQUALIFIED TO HEAR THE MATTER. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT TO ANOTHER JUDGE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 * * * PER THE ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE THIS CASE HAS BEEN ASSIGNED TO JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH IN DEPT. 504, COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER HAS BEEN NOTIFIED. * * *
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-11-2014 IN 504, PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT JORY, KIT PATRICK $377,724.21 PRINCIPAL, $15,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $392,724.21, PLUS INTEREST AT THE RATE OF $62.09 PER DAY BEGINNING FROM FEB-1-2013 UNTIL FULLY PAID. MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC'S, formerly known as WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC, Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Continued to December 31, 2013 to give Wells Fargo Advisors, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Wells Fargo Advisors, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers, petition, and proofs of service to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the petition will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
